top_signals.title: U.S. sanctions Iran's Hormuz Strait authority, condemns ballistic missile launch at Kuwait
top_signals.summary: The latest military and economic actions come as President Trump insists he feels no pressure to make a deal with Iran before November's midterm elections.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US core PCE inflation continues to rise
top_signals.summary: Higher inflation in April is due to energy, tariffs and AI-related spending
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Oil Shoots Up After Iran and US Exchange Air Strikes
top_signals.summary: Oil prices jumped more than 2% on Thursday after Iran's Revolutionary Guards said they targeted a U.S. airbase in response to a U.S. attack in the port city of Bandar Abbas.Brent crude futures LCOc1 rose $2.34, or 2.48%, to $96.63 a barrel by 0701 GMT…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Drone Stocks Soar on News of Trump Team Eyeing Funding Deals
top_signals.summary: Shares of drone makers and suppliers rallied Thursday after a report said the Trump Administration is exploring potential funding deals with a group of companies to increase domestic production and lower costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Statement by President von der Leyen with Bulgarian Prime Minister Radev
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Statement Brussels, 28 May 2026 Dear Prime Minister Radev,
It is a great pleasure to welcome you again to the Berlaymont today. This has been a very important year for Bulgaria. Since January,...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Starbucks says afternoon traffic is rising as turnaround starts to take hold
top_signals.summary: Starbucks says afternoon traffic is surging, led by menu innovation, as CEO Brian Niccol pushes to turn the chain into an all-day destination.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Disciplined AI agents are the disruptor needed to break the exchange churn model
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bit Digital extends $100 million loan facility to WhiteFiber, backed by Ethereum credit line
top_signals.summary: Bit Digital said advances may be funded through an Ethereum-denominated secured credit facility, letting it retain ETH exposure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
top_signals.summary: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."

top_signals.title: Most planned natural gas pipeline capacity additions in 2026 and 2027 originate in Texas
top_signals.summary: Developers plan to bring approximately 44.9 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) of new pipeline capacity online in the United States in 2026 and 2027, according to our latest Natural Gas Pipeline Projects Tracker. Approximately 70% (31.6 Bcf/d) of this new capacity is already under construction. More than 66% (29.7 Bcf/d) of the capacity additions originate in Texas. Louisiana is second with 19% (8.4 Bcf/d) of total capacity additions.
